role_justifications.conductor: User explicitly requested MAW and a sanctioned redesign; conductor records scope and gates.
role_justifications.planner: Plan protected background selector changes without photo drift.
role_justifications.worker: Implement derived base-tone color selector and tests.
role_justifications.change_verifier: Verify changed files stay scoped and no large/dependency files are introduced.
role_justifications.a11y_auditor: Review native color input and reduced preset accessibility risks.
role_justifications.visual_verifier: Check visual sanity because this is a deliberate redesign, not byte-parity CSS refactor.

redesign_authorization: The user explicitly requested this UI redesign, satisfying AGENTS.md: do not redesign the UI unless the user explicitly asks for a redesign.
hard_gates: Photo backgrounds untouched and still selectable/rendering.
No computed-style byte-parity gate for color tones because visual change is intended.
Functional e2e for preset, custom color, reload persistence, and undo.
No dependency or Electron version changes.
